MOTION Notice Of Petition To Release Mechanic Lien
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Christopher S. Chen, Esq. of MOSCONE, EMBLIDGE & QUADRA LLP 362-3599 for Petitioner MARCIA ELIAS moving to release mechanic's lien

The Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Petitioner MARCIA ELIAS petition to release mechanic lien is granted -- no opposition filed. Attorney fees granted in the amount of $1000. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
